metadata.title:
MUST REPLACE BRIDGES


WITHOUT COST TO CITY

pages.raw_text:
For little has yet been said Of
ficially of criminal negligence in
exposing men, women and children
everybody who crossed at How
ard street, on foot or cars-to a
crash into the torrent that in an
other instant would have hurled
them over the falls without hope
of rescue.


Can Settle Question Of Supremacy.


The Washington Water Power
company's officers represent
transportation of some conse-
quence.


The city administration Of Spo.
kane represents a municipal cor,
poration of $4,000 people, every
elector OF which is. or should be,
an influential and interested citi.
zen.


Which is the greater? Spokane
can settle that question by standing
solidly behind the council in this
instance and demanding that every
official from Mayor Daggett down
do to his. whole duty to the public.
